copyText:
Kickoff Lock Agent Cloudflare Pages deploy plan
Ready: no
Project: kickoff-lock-agent
Branch: main
Planned URL: https://kickoff-lock-agent.pages.dev/
Same-origin data proxy: yes
Same-origin Filecoin seal proxy: yes
Next action: Set Pages runtime secrets: APIFOOTBALL_KEY is missing for same-origin /data-proxy enrichment. FILECOIN_SEAL_UPSTREAM_URL is missing. FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN is missing for same-origin /seal token injection.
Commands:
- bun run pages:functions:build
- bun run pages:cf:check
- bun run pages:cf:deploy
Read-back commands:
- Published app root: curl -sS 'https://kickoff-lock-agent.pages.dev/'
- Published runtime config: curl -sS 'https://kickoff-lock-agent.pages.dev/runtime-config.js'
- Same-origin data proxy health: curl -sS 'https://kickoff-lock-agent.pages.dev/data-proxy/health'
- Same-origin Filecoin seal health: curl -sS 'https://kickoff-lock-agent.pages.dev/seal/health'
Secret exposure checks:
- Published runtime config excludes server secrets: passed · runtime-config.js only needs public VITE values
- Read-back commands exclude secret values: passed · curl commands use public health/read-back URLs only
- Browser API keys are not required for enrichment: passed · same-origin /data-proxy injects API-Football/Odds credentials server-side
- Browser seal token is not required: passed · same-origin /seal injects FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN server-side
Proxy capability checks:
- Free schedule/score feeds: passed · same-origin proxy exposes ESPN, openfootball, TheSportsDB and worldcup26 allowlisted reads
- API-Football lineups/injuries/rankings: pending · set APIFOOTBALL_KEY as a Pages runtime secret
- Odds/handicap enrichment: pending · set ODDS_API_KEY as a Pages runtime secret
- Async Filecoin upload: pending · set FILECOIN_SEAL_UPSTREAM_URL and FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN
- Upload status polling: pending · deploy /jobs/:id Pages Function and upstream seal API
- CID proof read-back: pending · deploy /proof/:cid and /verify routes
Stages:
- Build Cloudflare Pages Functions bundle [done]
  command: bun run pages:functions:build
  missing: none
  detail: Cloudflare Pages Functions bundle compiled with Wrangler.
- Set Pages runtime secrets [blocked]
  command: Set Cloudflare Pages environment variables: APIFOOTBALL_KEY, ODDS_API_KEY, FILECOIN_SEAL_UPSTREAM_URL, FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN, ALLOW_ORIGIN
  missing: APIFOOTBALL_KEY, FILECOIN_SEAL_UPSTREAM_URL, FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN
  detail: APIFOOTBALL_KEY is missing for same-origin /data-proxy enrichment. FILECOIN_SEAL_UPSTREAM_URL is missing. FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN is missing for same-origin /seal token injection.
- Authenticate Cloudflare deploy [blocked]
  command: bun run pages:cf:check
  missing: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
  detail: Set CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN and CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID, or run bunx wrangler login and set CLOUDFLARE_WRANGLER_LOGIN=1.
- Deploy app and same-origin backend routes [blocked]
  command: bun run pages:cf:deploy
  missing: APIFOOTBALL_KEY, FILECOIN_SEAL_UPSTREAM_URL, FILECOIN_SEAL_TOKEN, CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
  detail: Complete Functions, runtime secrets and Cloudflare auth before deploying the same-origin backend routes.
